summary: Added agent-native BreezeDoc workflows for invoice lifecycle, client workspace snapshot, document follow-up, and signature packet prep.
reason: The generated endpoint wrappers exposed the raw API, but agents needed compound workflows that coordinate related BreezeDoc operations with structured output and dry-run/send safety.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; full live dogfood passed 86/86 counted tests with mutating workflow paths exercised under --dry-run.
